steps.title: Recognize the series
steps.content: The sentence lists three deserts: Chihuahuan, Karakum, and Taklamakan. Because each item includes an internal comma before its ranking, semicolons are needed to separate the items clearly.

steps.title: Reject punctuation errors
steps.content: A splits Karakum Desert from its ranking. B runs the list together without proper separators. C uses a comma where the first item should be separated from the second. The remaining choice keeps the internal comma and uses semicolons between list items. The answer is D.
